Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** **********************************************************

Benedikt Ahrens, Ralph Matthes

SubstitutionSystems

2015


************************************************************)


(** **********************************************************

Contents :

-    Definition of heterogeneous substitution systems
-    Various lemmas about the substitution ("bracket") operation
-    Definition of precategory of substitution systems



************************************************************)


Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Local Open Scope cat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorAlgebras.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.BinCoproducts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PointedFunctors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.HorizontalComposition.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PointedFunctorsComposition.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Signatures.
Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Notation.
Local Open Scope subsys.

Section fix_a_category.

(** ** Some variables and assumptions *)


Context (C : category) (CP : BinCoproducts C).

Local Notation "'EndC'":= ([C, C]) .
Let CPEndC : BinCoproducts EndC := BinCoproducts_functor_precat _ _ CP.

(** The category of pointed endofunctors on [C] *)
Local Notation "'Ptd'" := (category_Ptd C).
(** The category of endofunctors on [C] *)
Local Notation "'EndC'":= ([C, C]) .

(** preparations for the definition of hss based on a functor [H] *)
Section prep_hss.

Context (H : functor [C, C] [C, C]).

Definition Const_plus_H (X : EndC) : functor EndC EndC
  := BinCoproduct_of_functors _ _ CPEndC (constant_functor _ _ X) H.

Definition Id_H : functor EndC EndC
  := Const_plus_H (functor_identity _ : EndC).


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X: [C, C]
T: algebra_ob (Const_plus_H X)
[C, C] ⟦ X, `T ⟧


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X: [C, C]
T: algebra_ob (Const_plus_H X)
[C, C] ⟦ X, `T ⟧

  exact (tau1_from_alg CPEndC (constant_functor _ _ X) H T).
Defined.

Local Notation η := eta_from_alg.

(* An Id_H algebra is a pointed functor *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
Ptd


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
Ptd

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
functor_identity C ⟹ pr1 T

  exact (η T).
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X: [C, C]
T: algebra_ob (Const_plus_H X)
[C, C] ⟦ H `T, `T ⟧


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
X: [C, C]
T: algebra_ob (Const_plus_H X)
[C, C] ⟦ H `T, `T ⟧

  exact (tau2_from_alg CPEndC (constant_functor _ _ X) H T).
Defined.

Local Notation τ := tau_from_alg.

(*
Coercion functor_from_algebra_ob (X : algebra_ob _ Id_H) : functor C C  := pr1 X.
*)

Local Notation "f ⊕ g" := (BinCoproductOfArrows _ (CPEndC _ _ ) (CPEndC _ _ ) f g).

(** analysis of the "bracket operation" individually for each pointed functor *)
Section fix_a_pointed_functor.

  Context {Z: Ptd}.
  Context (θ : @PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z).


Definition bracket_property (T : algebra_ob Id_H) (f : Z --> ptd_from_alg T)
           (h : `T • (U Z)  --> `T) : UU
  :=
    alg_map _ T •• (U Z) · h =
          (identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) ·
          (identity (U Z) ⊕ #H h) ·
          (BinCoproductArrow  (CPEndC _ _ ) (#U f) (tau_from_alg T)).

Definition bracket_at (T : algebra_ob Id_H) (f : Z --> ptd_from_alg T): UU :=
  ∃! h : `T • (U Z)  --> `T, bracket_property T f h.


Definition bracket_property_parts (T : algebra_ob Id_H) (f : Z --> ptd_from_alg T)
           (h : `T • (U Z)  --> `T) : UU
  :=
    (#U f = η T •• (U Z) · h) ×
     (θ `T · #H h · τ T  = τ T •• (U Z) ·  h).

Definition bracket_parts_at (T : algebra_ob Id_H) (f : Z --> ptd_from_alg T) : UU :=
   ∃! h : `T • (U Z)  --> `T, bracket_property_parts T f h.

(* show that for any h of suitable type, the following are equivalent *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
bracket_property T f h → bracket_property_parts T f h


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
bracket_property T f h → bracket_property_parts T f h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
bracket_property_parts T f h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
# U f = η T •• U Z · h
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• U Z · h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
# U f = η T •• U Z · h
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
# U f =
tau1_from_alg CPEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (functor_identity C))
  H T •• U Z · h

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
∏ x : C,
# U f x =
(tau1_from_alg CPEndC
   (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
      (functor_identity C)) H T •• U Z · h) x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
c: C
# U f c =
(tau1_from_alg CPEndC
   (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
      (functor_identity C)) H T •• U Z · h) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
c: C
pr1 f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
c: C
pr1 f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H `T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp_inst: (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
 · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
 · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T))
     (# U f) (τ T)) c
pr1 f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H `T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp_inst: BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
   · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) 
       (# U f) (τ T)) c
pr1 f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H `T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp_inst: BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
   · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) 
       (# U f) (τ T)) c
pr1 f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp_inst: BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
   · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) 
       (# U f) (τ T)) c
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C] (functor_identity C) `T 
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) 
       (# U f) (τ T)) c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H `T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) T 
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp_inst: BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
   · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) 
       (# U f) (τ T)) c
pr1 f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
pr1 f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
pr1 f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
   · ((identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
      · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T))
          (# U f) (τ T))) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
pr1 f c =
(identity (U Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1
     (CPEndC (U Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z `T))) c
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
pr1 f c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CPEndC (U Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_target H) Z `T)) c
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
pr1 f c =
(identity (U Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T))) c
· BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
    (τ T) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
pr1 f c =
BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) c
· BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
    (τ T) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
pr1 f c = # U f c

      apply idpath.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp_inst: BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
   · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) 
       (# U f) (τ T)) c
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H `T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H `T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H `T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · h c)

      apply idpath.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• U Z · h
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
θ `T · # H h
· tau2_from_alg CPEndC
    (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
       (functor_identity C)) H T =
tau2_from_alg CPEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (functor_identity C))
  H T •• U Z · h

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
∏ x : C,
(θ `T · # H h
 · tau2_from_alg CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C)) H T) x =
(tau2_from_alg CPEndC
   (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
      (functor_identity C)) H T •• U Z · h) x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
c: C
(θ `T · # H h
 · tau2_from_alg CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C)) H T) c =
(tau2_from_alg CPEndC
   (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
      (functor_identity C)) H T •• U Z · h) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
c: C
θ `T c · # H h c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property T f h
c: C
θ `T c · # H h c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H `T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp_inst: (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
 · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
 · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T))
     (# U f) (τ T)) c
θ `T c · # H h c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H `T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h c

Hyp_inst: BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
   · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) 
       (# U f) (τ T)) c
θ `T c · # H h c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]

· alg_map

· h c

        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =

  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)

   · BinCoproductArrow

θ `T c · # H h c

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp_inst: BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
   · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) 
       (# U f) (τ T)) c
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C] (functor_identity C) `T 
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) 
       (# U f) (τ T)) c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H `T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) T 
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]

  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
   · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow

       (# U f) (τ T)) c
θ `T c · # H h c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC

H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
θ `T c · # H h c
· (BinCoproductIn2
     (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
θ `T c
· (# H h c
   · (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) T c)) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
   · ((identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
      · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T))
          (# U f) (τ T))) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
θ `T c
· (# H h c
   · (BinCoproductIn2
        (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) T c)) =
(θ `T
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC (U Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z `T))) c
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
θ `T c
· (# H h c
   · (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `T c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) T c)) =
θ `T c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `T)
    c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (pr1 Z ∙ `T)) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     (# H h · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
       (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
θ `T c
· (# H h c
   · (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `T c))
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) T c)) =
θ `T c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        `T) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (pr1 Z ∙ `T)) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
        (# H h
         · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
          (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
# H h c
· (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `T c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `T)
  c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (pr1 Z ∙ `T)) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     (# H h · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
       (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
# H h c
· (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `T c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
(# H h · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
    (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
# H h c
· (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `T c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
# H h c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
    (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
# H h c
· (BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `T c))
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
# H h c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
       (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `T c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
    (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `T c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
    (pr1 T) (pr1 f)
    (tau2_from_alg CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H T) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn2 (CP c (H `T c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T c =
tau2_from_alg CPEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C] (functor_identity C))
  H T c

      apply idpath.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp_inst: BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C]
        (functor_identity C : [C, C]) `T
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
   · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow
       (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) 
       (# U f) (τ T)) c
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H `T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H `T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 (pr1 Z) c))
     (H `T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)))
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · h c)

      apply idpath.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
bracket_property_parts T f h → bracket_property T f h


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
bracket_property_parts T f h → bracket_property T f h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U f = η T •• U Z · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• U Z · h
bracket_property T f h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U f = η T •• U Z · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• U Z · h
∏ x : C,
(alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) x =
((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
 · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
     (τ T)) x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U f = η T •• U Z · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• U Z · h
c: C
(alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
 · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
     (τ T)) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U f = η T •• U Z · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• U Z · h
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U f = η T •• U Z · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• U Z · h
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C] (functor_identity C) `T 
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] 
        [C, C] (functor_identity C) `T 
        (U Z c)) (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) 
       (# U f) (τ T)) c

f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧

Hyp1: # U f = η T •• U Z · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• U Z · h
c: C
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =

  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]

CP: BinCoproducts C

θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp1_inst: # U f c = (η T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =

     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c

T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧

c: C
Hyp1_inst: # U f c = (η T •• U Z · h) c

  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =

  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
   · ((identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
      · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T))
          (# U f) (τ T))) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp1_inst: # U f c = (η T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
(identity (U Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1
     (CPEndC (U Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z `T))) c
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp1_inst: # U f c = (η T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn1
  (CPEndC (U Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_target H) Z `T)) c
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp1_inst: # U f c = (η T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
(identity (U Z)
 · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T))) c
· BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
    (τ T) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp1_inst: # U f c = (η T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) c
· BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
    (τ T) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp1_inst: # U f c = (η T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn1
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
# U f c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp1_inst: # U f c = (η T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `T (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c) =
pr1 f c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp1_inst: pr1 f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `T (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c) =
pr1 f c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp1_inst: pr1 f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `T (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp1_inst: pr1 f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `T (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· h c

    apply assoc.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U f = η T •• U Z · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• U Z · h
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• U Z · h
c: C
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c

f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧

Hyp2_inst: (θ `T · # H h · τ T) c =
(τ T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =

  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T) · (identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp2_inst: (θ `T · # H h · τ T) c =
(τ T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c)))
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ θ `T)
   · ((identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
      · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T))
          (# U f) (τ T))) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp2_inst: (θ `T · # H h · τ T) c =
(τ T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn2
  (CP
     (constant_functor [C, C] [C, C]
        (functor_identity C) `T (U Z c))
     (H `T (U Z c))) · (alg_map Id_H T •• U Z · h) c =
(θ `T
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC (U Z)
        (functor_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
           (θ_target H) Z `T))) c
· ((identity (U Z) ⊕ # H h)
   · BinCoproductArrow (CPEndC (U Z) (H `T)) (# U f)
       (τ T)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp2_inst: (θ `T · # H h · τ T) c =
(τ T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `T (pr1 Z c)))
· (pr1 (alg_map Id_H T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c) =
θ `T c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `T)
    c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (pr1 Z ∙ `T)) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     (# H h · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
       (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp2_inst: (θ `T · # H h · τ T) c =
(τ T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `T (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1 (alg_map Id_H T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c =
θ `T c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `T)
    c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (pr1 Z ∙ `T)) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     (# H h · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
       (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp2_inst: (θ `T · # H h · τ T) c =
(τ T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `T (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1 (alg_map Id_H T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp2_inst: (θ `T · # H h · τ T) c =
(τ T •• U Z · h) c
?b =
θ `T c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP 
    (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob 
       [C, C, C] (precategory_Ptd C) 
       [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `T) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
     (pr1 Z) (H (pr1 Z ∙ `T)) 
     (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     (# H h · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP 
       (pr1 Z) (H `T) (pr1 T) 
       (pr1 f) (τ T) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp2_inst: (θ `T · # H h · τ T) c =
(τ T •• U Z · h) c
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `T (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1 (alg_map Id_H T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c = ?b
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp2_inst: (θ `T · # H h · τ T) c =
(τ T •• U Z · h) c
?b =
BinCoproductIn2 (CP (pr1 Z c) (H `T (pr1 Z c)))
· pr1 (alg_map Id_H T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · h c

      exact Hyp2_inst.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
Hyp2_inst: (θ `T · # H h · τ T) c =
(τ T •• U Z · h) c
(θ `T · # H h · τ T) c =
θ `T c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `T)
    c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (pr1 Z ∙ `T)) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     (# H h · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
       (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c)
