H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
(θ `T · # H h · τ T) c =
θ `T c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `T)
    c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (pr1 Z ∙ `T)) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     (# H h · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
       (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
θ `T c · # H h c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
θ `T c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
    (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
       (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `T)
    c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (pr1 Z ∙ `T)) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     (# H h · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
       (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
θ `T c
· (# H h c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) T c)) =
θ `T c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
        (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z
        `T) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
        (H (pr1 Z ∙ `T)) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))
        (identity (pr1 Z)
         · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
        (# H h
         · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))) c
      · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
          (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c))

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
# H h c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
  (functor_fix_snd_arg_ob [C, C, C]
     (precategory_Ptd C) [C, C, C] (θ_target H) Z `T)
  c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z)
     (H (pr1 Z ∙ `T)) (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))
     (identity (pr1 Z)
      · BinCoproductIn1 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     (# H h · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T)))
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
       (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
# H h c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
(# H h · BinCoproductIn2 (CPEndC (pr1 Z) (H `T))) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
    (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
# H h c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
# H h c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
    (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
# H h c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
# H h c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
     c
   · coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
       (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c)

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (pr1 Z) (H `T)
    (pr1 T) (pr1 f) (τ T) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
Z: Ptd
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H Z
T: algebra_ob Id_H
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T c = τ T c

      apply idpath.
Qed.


(* show bracket_parts_point is logically equivalent to bracket_point, then
   use it to show that bracket_parts is equivalent to bracket using [weqonsecfibers:
  ∏ (X : UU) (P Q : X → UU),
  (∏ x : X, P x ≃ Q x) → (∏ x : X, P x) ≃ (∏ x : X, Q x)] *)

End fix_a_pointed_functor.

Section instantiate_with_identity.

    Context (T : algebra_ob Id_H).
    Context (θ : @PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H (ptd_from_alg T)).

Definition bracket_property_parts_identity_nicer (h : `T • `T  --> `T) : UU
  := (identity `T = η T •• `T · h) × (θ `T · #H h · τ T  = τ T •• `T ·  h).


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
bracket_property_parts θ T (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
  h → bracket_property_parts_identity_nicer h


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
bracket_property_parts θ T (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
  h → bracket_property_parts_identity_nicer h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property_parts θ T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) h
bracket_property_parts_identity_nicer h
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
bracket_property_parts_identity_nicer h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
identity `T = η T •• `T · h
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
identity `T = η T •• `T · h
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
identity `T = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
?b = η T •• `T · h

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
?b = η T •• `T · h
 exact Hyp1. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
identity `T = # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
∏ x : C,
identity `T x = # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
c: C
identity `T c = # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) c

    apply idpath.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
θ `T · # H h · τ T = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
?b = τ T •• `T · h

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
θ `T · # H h · τ T = ?b
 exact Hyp2. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: # U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T =
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h = τ T •• `T · h

    apply idpath.
Qed.

(** basically the same proof *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
bracket_property_parts_identity_nicer h
→ bracket_property_parts θ T
    (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp: bracket_property_parts_identity_nicer h
bracket_property_parts θ T (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
  h
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
bracket_property_parts θ T (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
  h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
# U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
# U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) =
η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
# U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
?b = η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
?b = η T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
 exact Hyp1. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
# U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) = identity `T

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
∏ x : C,
# U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) x = identity `T x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
c: C
# U (identity (ptd_from_alg T)) c = identity `T c

    apply idpath.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
θ `T · # H h · τ T = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
?b = τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
θ `T · # H h · τ T = ?b
 exact Hyp2. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
θ: PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H
  (ptd_from_alg T)
h: [C, C, C] ⟦ `T ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
Hyp1: identity `T = η T •• `T · h
Hyp2: θ `T · # H h · τ T = τ T •• `T · h
τ T •• `T · h = τ T •• U (ptd_from_alg T) · h

    apply idpath.
Qed.

End instantiate_with_identity.

(** the notion one would be looking for: an algebra and a substitution operation that does lookup on
variables and behaves homomorphically elsewhere, as instructed by the pre-strength at that point *)
Definition heterogeneous_substitution : UU := ∑ (T: algebra_ob Id_H),
  ∑ (θ : @PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H (ptd_from_alg T)), bracket_at θ T (identity _).

Coercion alg_from_hetsubst (T : heterogeneous_substitution) : algebra_ob Id_H := pr1 T.
Definition θ_from_hetsubst (T : heterogeneous_substitution) : @PrestrengthForSignatureAtPoint C C C H (ptd_from_alg T)
  := pr1 (pr2 T).

(** we write prejoin as a warning that the monad laws are not necessarily fulfilled *)
Definition prejoin_from_hetsubst (T : heterogeneous_substitution) : `T • `T --> `T
  := pr1 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 T))).


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: heterogeneous_substitution
identity `T = η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: heterogeneous_substitution
identity `T = η T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: heterogeneous_substitution
bracket_property_parts (θ_from_hetsubst T) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
  (prejoin_from_hetsubst T)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: heterogeneous_substitution
bracket_property (θ_from_hetsubst T) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
  (prejoin_from_hetsubst T)

  exact (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 T)))).
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: heterogeneous_substitution
θ_from_hetsubst T `T · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T)
· τ T = τ T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: heterogeneous_substitution
θ_from_hetsubst T `T · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T)
· τ T = τ T •• `T · prejoin_from_hetsubst T

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: heterogeneous_substitution
bracket_property_parts (θ_from_hetsubst T) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
  (prejoin_from_hetsubst T)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: heterogeneous_substitution
bracket_property (θ_from_hetsubst T) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
  (prejoin_from_hetsubst T)

  exact (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 T)))).
Qed.

Section fix_a_prestrength.

  Context (θ :  @PrestrengthForSignature C C C H).

Definition bracket (T : algebra_ob Id_H) : UU
  := ∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Z --> ptd_from_alg T), bracket_at (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg _ _ _ _ _ θ Z) T f.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ: PrestrengthForSignature H
T: algebra_ob Id_H
isaprop (bracket T)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ: PrestrengthForSignature H
T: algebra_ob Id_H
isaprop (bracket T)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ: PrestrengthForSignature H
T: algebra_ob Id_H
Z: Ptd
isaprop
  (∏ f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧,
   bracket_at
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) T f)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
θ: PrestrengthForSignature H
T: algebra_ob Id_H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
isaprop
  (bracket_at
     (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
        (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) T f)

  apply isapropiscontr.
Qed.

Definition bracket_parts (T : algebra_ob Id_H) : UU
  := ∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Z --> ptd_from_alg T), bracket_parts_at (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg _ _ _ _ _ θ Z) T f.

End fix_a_prestrength.

End prep_hss.

Arguments ptd_from_alg {_} _ .
Arguments prejoin_from_hetsubst {_} _ .
Arguments prejoin_from_hetsubst_η {_} _ .
Arguments prejoin_from_hetsubst_τ {_} _ .
Arguments bracket_parts {_} _ _ .

  Section def_hss.

  Context (H : Presignature C C C).

  Local Notation η := (eta_from_alg H).
  Local Notation τ := (tau_from_alg H).

  Let θ : PrestrengthForSignature H := theta H.
  Let Id_H : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C] := Id_H H.

(** the notion of a heterogeneous substitution system that asks for more operations to uniquely exist *)
Definition hss : UU := ∑ (T: algebra_ob Id_H), bracket H θ T.

Coercion hetsubst_from_hss (T : hss) : heterogeneous_substitution H := pr1 T,, (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg _ _ _ _ _ θ (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T)) ,, pr2 T _ (identity _)).


Definition fbracket (T : hss) {Z : Ptd} (f : Z --> ptd_from_alg T)
  : `T • (U Z) --> `T
  := pr1 (pr1 (pr2 T Z f)).

Notation "⦃ f ⦄" := (fbracket _ f)(at level 0).

(** The bracket operation [fbracket] is unique *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
∏ α : U Z ∙ `T ⟹ pr1 `T,
(∏ c : C,
 pr1 (# U f) c =
 pr1 (eta_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c)
→ (∏ c : C,
   pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z)) c · pr1 (# H α) c
   · pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
   pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c)
  → α = ⦃ f ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
∏ α : U Z ∙ `T ⟹ pr1 `T,
(∏ c : C,
 pr1 (# U f) c =
 pr1 (eta_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c)
→ (∏ c : C,
   pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z)) c · pr1 (# H α) c
   · pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
   pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c)
  → α = ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
α: U Z ∙ `T ⟹ pr1 `T
H1: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (# U f) c =
pr1 (eta_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
H2: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z)) c · pr1 (# H α) c
· pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
α = ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
α: U Z ∙ `T ⟹ pr1 `T
H1: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (# U f) c =
pr1 (eta_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
H2: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z)) c · pr1 (# H α) c
· pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
bracket_property H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) (pr1 T) f α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
α: U Z ∙ `T ⟹ pr1 `T
H1: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (# U f) c =
pr1 (eta_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
H2: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z)) c · pr1 (# H α) c
· pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
bracket_property_parts H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) (pr1 T) f α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
α: U Z ∙ `T ⟹ pr1 `T
H1: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (# U f) c =
pr1 (eta_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
H2: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z)) c · pr1 (# H α) c
· pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
# U f = eta_from_alg H (pr1 T) •• U Z · α
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
α: U Z ∙ `T ⟹ pr1 `T
H1: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (# U f) c =
pr1 (eta_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
H2: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z)) c · pr1 (# H α) c
· pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `
  (pr1 T) · # H α · tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) •• U Z · α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
α: U Z ∙ `T ⟹ pr1 `T
H1: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (# U f) c =
pr1 (eta_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
H2: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z)) c · pr1 (# H α) c
· pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
# U f = eta_from_alg H (pr1 T) •• U Z · α
 apply nat_trans_eq_alt; assumption.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
α: U Z ∙ `T ⟹ pr1 `T
H1: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (# U f) c =
pr1 (eta_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
H2: ∏ c : C,
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z)) c · pr1 (# H α) c
· pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c) · α c
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ Z `(pr1 T) · # H α
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) •• U Z · α
 apply nat_trans_eq_alt; assumption.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
∏ α : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧,
bracket_property_parts H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) T f α → α = ⦃ f ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
∏ α : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧,
bracket_property_parts H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) T f α → α = ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
α: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
H1: # U f = eta_from_alg H T •• U Z · α
H2: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T · 
# H α · tau_from_alg H T =
tau_from_alg H T •• U Z · α
α = ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
α: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
H1: # U f = eta_from_alg H T •• U Z · α
H2: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T · 
# H α · tau_from_alg H T =
tau_from_alg H T •• U Z · α
bracket_property H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) (pr1 T) f α

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
α: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
H1: # U f = eta_from_alg H T •• U Z · α
H2: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T · 
# H α · tau_from_alg H T =
tau_from_alg H T •• U Z · α
bracket_property_parts H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) (pr1 T) f α

  split;  assumption.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
∏ α : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧,
bracket_property_parts H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) T f α
→ ∏ c : C, pr1 α c = pr1 ⦃ f ⦄ c


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
∏ α : [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧,
bracket_property_parts H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) T f α
→ ∏ c : C, pr1 α c = pr1 ⦃ f ⦄ c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
α: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
H12: bracket_property_parts H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
     (θ_target H) θ Z) T f α
∏ c : C, pr1 α c = pr1 ⦃ f ⦄ c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
α: [C, C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], `T ⟧
H12: bracket_property_parts H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H) 
     (θ_target H) θ Z) T f α
t:= fbracket_unique T f α H12: α = ⦃ f ⦄
∏ c : C, pr1 α c = pr1 ⦃ f ⦄ c

  apply (nat_trans_eq_weq (homset_property C) _ _ t).
Qed.

(** Properties of [fbracket] by definition: commutative diagrams *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧),
# U f = eta_from_alg H T •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧),
# U f = eta_from_alg H T •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
# U f = eta_from_alg H T •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄

  (* assert (H' := parts_from_whole T Z f (fbracket _ f)) . *)
  exact (pr1 (parts_from_whole _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 T Z f))))).
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧),
θ (`T ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · tau_from_alg H T =
tau_from_alg H T •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧),
θ (`T ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · tau_from_alg H T =
tau_from_alg H T •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
θ (`T ⊗ Z) · # H ⦃ f ⦄ · tau_from_alg H T =
tau_from_alg H T •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄

  exact (pr2 (parts_from_whole _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 T Z f))))).
Qed.

(** [fbracket] is also natural *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
(`T ∘ # U f
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], U Z' ∙ `T : [C, C, C]
 ⟧) · ⦃ g ⦄ = ⦃ f · g ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
(`T ∘ # U f
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C], U Z' ∙ `T : [C, C, C]
 ⟧) · ⦃ g ⦄ = ⦃ f · g ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
∏ c : C,
pr1 (# U (f · g)) c =
pr1 (eta_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c)
· (`T ∘ # U f · ⦃ g ⦄) c
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
∏ c : C,
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z)) c · pr1 (# H (`T ∘ # U f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c)
· (`T ∘ # U f · ⦃ g ⦄) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
∏ c : C,
pr1 (# U (f · g)) c =
pr1 (eta_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c)
· (`T ∘ # U f · ⦃ g ⦄) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
∏ c : C,
f c · g c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c) · ⦃ g ⦄ c)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
f c · g c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c) · ⦃ g ⦄ c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
f c · g c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · # (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· ⦃ g ⦄ c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H': ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (functor_identity C) f · eta_from_alg H T x' =
eta_from_alg H T x · # (`T) f
f c · g c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · # (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· ⦃ g ⦄ c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H': ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
f
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) x'
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) x') =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) x
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) x · # (`(pr1 T)) f
f c · g c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · # (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· ⦃ g ⦄ c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
f c · g c =
pr1 (pr1 f) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 Z' c)) · ⦃ g ⦄ c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
f c · g c =
pr1 (pr1 f) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 Z' c) · ⦃ g ⦄ c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
g c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) (pr1 Z' c)
· ⦃ g ⦄ c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
X: ∏ c : C,
# U g c = (eta_from_alg H T •• U Z' · ⦃ g ⦄) c
g c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) (pr1 Z' c)
· ⦃ g ⦄ c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
X: ∏ c : C,
pr1 g c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z') c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 Z') c) · 
⦃ g ⦄ c
g c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) (pr1 Z' c)
· ⦃ g ⦄ c
 exact (X _ ).
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
∏ c : C,
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z)) c · pr1 (# H (`T ∘ # U f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) (pr1 (U Z) c)
· (`T ∘ # U f · ⦃ g ⦄) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c) · ⦃ g ⦄ c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H': ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H `T) f · tau_from_alg H T x' =
tau_from_alg H T x · # (`T) f
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c) · ⦃ g ⦄ c)

· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) x'
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)

· alg_map

          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) x · # (`(pr1 T)) f
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c) · ⦃ g ⦄ c)

· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP

c: C

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H': ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H `(pr1 T)) f
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) x'
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) x') =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) x
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) x · # (`(pr1 T)) f
?f =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c) · # (pr1 `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
 apply H'. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H': ∏ (x x' : C) (f : C ⟦ x, x' ⟧),
# (H `(pr1 T)) f
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) x'
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) x') =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) x
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) x · # (`(pr1 T)) f
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
# (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 Z' c)) · ⦃ g ⦄ c

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
# (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC

             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 Z' c)) · ⦃ g ⦄ c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`T ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄ · tau_from_alg H T =
tau_from_alg H T •• U Z' · ⦃ g ⦄
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
# (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 Z' c)) · ⦃ g ⦄ c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
# (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 Z' c)) · ⦃ g ⦄ c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
X: (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
 · tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) c =
(pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
   (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
 ⦃ g ⦄) c
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
# (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 Z' c)) · ⦃ g ⦄ c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
X: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') c · # H ⦃ g ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z') c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 Z') c) · 
⦃ g ⦄ c
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
# (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 Z' c)) · ⦃ g ⦄ c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
X: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') c · # H ⦃ g ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z') c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 Z') c) · 
⦃ g ⦄ c
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
# (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 Z' c)) · ⦃ g ⦄ c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
X: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') c · # H ⦃ g ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z') c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors

       (constant_functor

          (functor_identity C)) H)

⦃ g ⦄ c
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP

# (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP

   · alg_map
