          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 Z' c) · ⦃ g ⦄ c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
X: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') c · # H ⦃ g ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z') c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 Z') c) · 
⦃ g ⦄ c
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
# (pr1 (H `T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c) · pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z')) c
· pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c · pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
X: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') c · # H ⦃ g ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z') c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 Z') c) · 
⦃ g ⦄ c
# (pr1 (H `T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c) · pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z')) c
· pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c · pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
# (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) (pr1 Z' c) · 
   ⦃ g ⦄ c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
X: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') c · # H ⦃ g ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z') c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 Z') c) · 
⦃ g ⦄ c
# (pr1 (H `T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c) · pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z')) c
· pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c · pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
# (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 Z' c) · ⦃ g ⦄ c)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
X: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') c · # H ⦃ g ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z') c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 Z') c) · 
⦃ g ⦄ c
# (pr1 (H `T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c) · pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z')) c
· (pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c · pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c) =
# (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 Z' c) · ⦃ g ⦄ c)

         
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
X: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') c · # H ⦃ g ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z') c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 Z') c) · 
⦃ g ⦄ c
# (pr1 (H `T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· (pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z')) c
   · (pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c · pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c)) =
# (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T)
       (pr1 Z' c) · ⦃ g ⦄ c)

         
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
X: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') c · # H ⦃ g ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z') c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 Z') c) · 
⦃ g ⦄ c
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z')) c
· (pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c · pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) (pr1 Z' c)
· ⦃ g ⦄ c

         
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
X: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') c · # H ⦃ g ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z') c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 Z') c) · 
⦃ g ⦄ c
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z')) c · pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c
· pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) (pr1 Z' c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) (pr1 Z' c)
· ⦃ g ⦄ c

         apply X.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
X: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') c · # H ⦃ g ⦄ c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) 
     (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor 
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) 
       (pr1 T) c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T))
  (pr1 (pr1 Z') c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) 
    (pr1 T) (pr1 (pr1 Z') c) · 
⦃ g ⦄ c
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
# (pr1 (H `T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c) · pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z')) c
· pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c · pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
# (pr1 (H `T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c) · pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z')) c
· pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c · pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z, Z': Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧
g: Ptd ⟦ Z', ptd_from_alg T ⟧
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
A:= θ_nat_2_pointwise: ∏ (C D D' : category) (H : [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D])
(θ : θ_source H ⟹ θ_target H) 
(X : [C, D']) (Z Z' : category_Ptd C)
(f : category_Ptd C ⟦ Z, Z' ⟧) 
(c : C),
# (pr1 (H X)) (pr1 f c) · pr1 (θ (X ⊗ Z')) c =
pr1 (θ (X ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (identity X ⋆ pr1 f)) c
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
# (pr1 (H `T)) (pr1 (pr1 f) c) · pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z')) c
· pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c · pr1 (tau_from_alg H T) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
A:= θ_nat_2_pointwise: ∏ (C D D' : category)
(H : functor_precategory_data C D'
     ⟶ functor_precategory_data C D)
(θ : functor_composite_data
       (pair_functor_data H U)
       (functor_composite_data
          (functor_composite_data
             (bindelta_functor_data
                ([C, D] ⊠ [C, C]))
             (pair_functor_data
                (pr2_functor [C, D] [C, C])
                (pr1_functor [C, D] [C, C])))
          (functorial_composition_data C C D))
     ⟹ functor_composite_data
         (pair_functor_data
            (functor_identity
               (functor_precategory_data C D')) U)
         (functor_composite_data
            (functor_composite_data
               (bindelta_functor_data
                  ([C, D'] ⊠ [C, C]))
               (pair_functor_data
                  (pr2_functor [C, D'] [C, C])
                  (pr1_functor [C, D'] [C, C])))
            (functor_composite_data
               (functorial_composition_data C C D')
               H))) (X : C ⟶ D')
(Z Z' : ptd_obj C) (f : ptd_mor C Z Z') 
(c : C),
# (pr1 (H X)) (pr1 f c) · pr1 (θ (X ⊗ Z')) c =
pr1 (θ (X ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (identity X ⋆ pr1 f)) c
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
# (pr1 (H `(pr1 T))) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z')) c · pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
A:= θ_nat_2_pointwise: ∏ (C D D' : category)
(H : functor_precategory_data C D'
     ⟶ functor_precategory_data C D)
(θ : functor_composite_data
       (pair_functor_data H U)
       (functor_composite_data
          (functor_composite_data
             (bindelta_functor_data
                ([C, D] ⊠ [C, C]))
             (pair_functor_data
                (pr2_functor [C, D] [C, C])
                (pr1_functor [C, D] [C, C])))
          (functorial_composition_data C C D))
     ⟹ functor_composite_data
         (pair_functor_data
            (functor_identity
               (functor_precategory_data C D')) U)
         (functor_composite_data
            (functor_composite_data
               (bindelta_functor_data
                  ([C, D'] ⊠ [C, C]))
               (pair_functor_data
                  (pr2_functor [C, D'] [C, C])
                  (pr1_functor [C, D'] [C, C])))
            (functor_composite_data
               (functorial_composition_data C C D')
               H))) (X : C ⟶ D')
(Z Z' : ptd_obj C) (f : ptd_mor C Z Z') 
(c : C),
# (pr1 (H X)) (pr1 f c) · pr1 (θ (X ⊗ Z')) c =
pr1 (θ (X ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (identity X ⋆ pr1 f)) c
A':= A C C C H θ `T Z Z': ∏ (f : ptd_mor C Z Z') (c : C),
# (pr1 (H `T)) (pr1 f c) · pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z')) c =
pr1 (θ (`T ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (identity `T ⋆ pr1 f)) c
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
# (pr1 (H `(pr1 T))) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z')) c · pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
A:= θ_nat_2_pointwise: ∏ (C D D' : category)
(H : functor_precategory_data C D'
     ⟶ functor_precategory_data C D)
(θ : functor_composite_data
       (pair_functor_data H U)
       (functor_composite_data
          (functor_composite_data
             (bindelta_functor_data
                ([C, D] ⊠ [C, C]))
             (pair_functor_data
                (pr2_functor [C, D] [C, C])
                (pr1_functor [C, D] [C, C])))
          (functorial_composition_data C C D))
     ⟹ functor_composite_data
         (pair_functor_data
            (functor_identity
               (functor_precategory_data C D')) U)
         (functor_composite_data
            (functor_composite_data
               (bindelta_functor_data
                  ([C, D'] ⊠ [C, C]))
               (pair_functor_data
                  (pr2_functor [C, D'] [C, C])
                  (pr1_functor [C, D'] [C, C])))
            (functor_composite_data
               (functorial_composition_data C C D')
               H))) (X : C ⟶ D')
(Z Z' : ptd_obj C) (f : ptd_mor C Z Z') 
(c : C),
# (pr1 (H X)) (pr1 f c) · pr1 (θ (X ⊗ Z')) c =
pr1 (θ (X ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (identity X ⋆ pr1 f)) c
A':= A C C C H θ `(pr1 T) Z Z': ∏ (f : ptd_mor C Z Z') (c : C),
# (pr1 (H `(pr1 T))) (pr1 f c)
· pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z')) c =
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
# (pr1 (H `(pr1 T))) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z')) c · pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
A:= θ_nat_2_pointwise: ∏ (C D D' : category)
(H : functor_precategory_data C D'
     ⟶ functor_precategory_data C D)
(θ : functor_composite_data
       (pair_functor_data H U)
       (functor_composite_data
          (functor_composite_data
             (bindelta_functor_data
                ([C, D] ⊠ [C, C]))
             (pair_functor_data
                (pr2_functor [C, D] [C, C])
                (pr1_functor [C, D] [C, C])))
          (functorial_composition_data C C D))
     ⟹ functor_composite_data
         (pair_functor_data
            (functor_identity
               (functor_precategory_data C D')) U)
         (functor_composite_data
            (functor_composite_data
               (bindelta_functor_data
                  ([C, D'] ⊠ [C, C]))
               (pair_functor_data
                  (pr2_functor [C, D'] [C, C])
                  (pr1_functor [C, D'] [C, C])))
            (functor_composite_data
               (functorial_composition_data C C D')
               H))) (X : C ⟶ D')
(Z Z' : ptd_obj C) (f : ptd_mor C Z Z') 
(c : C),
# (pr1 (H X)) (pr1 f c) · pr1 (θ (X ⊗ Z')) c =
pr1 (θ (X ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (identity X ⋆ pr1 f)) c
A':= A C C C H θ `(pr1 T) Z Z': ∏ (f : ptd_mor C Z Z') (c : C),
# (pr1 (H `(pr1 T))) (pr1 f c)
· pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z')) c =
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
A2:= A' f: ∏ c : C,
# (pr1 (H `(pr1 T))) (pr1 f c)
· pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z')) c =
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
# (pr1 (H `(pr1 T))) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z')) c · pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
A2: ∏ c : C,
# (pr1 (H `(pr1 T))) (pr1 f c)
· pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z')) c =
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
# (pr1 (H `(pr1 T))) (pr1 (pr1 f) c)
· pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z')) c · pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
· pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)) =
pr1 (θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z)) c
· (pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
   · (pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
           (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
         · alg_map
             (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                CPEndC
                (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                   (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c)))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
· (pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c) =
pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
· (pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c))

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c =
pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
· pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) (pr1 T) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f · ⦃ g ⦄)) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c =
pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
· pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f) · # H ⦃ g ⦄) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c =
pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
· pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `(pr1 T)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
H':= fbracket_τ T g: θ (`(pr1 T) ⊗ Z') · # H ⦃ g ⦄
· tau_from_alg H (pr1 T) =
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C 
  (pr1 Z') (tau_from_alg H (pr1 T)) · 
⦃ g ⦄
pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f) · # H ⦃ g ⦄) c =
pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
· pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f) · # H ⦃ g ⦄) c =
pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
· pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
A:= horcomp_id_postwhisker C C C: ∏ (X X' : [C, C]) (α : [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧)
(Z : [C, C]), nat_trans_id Z ⋆ α = Z ∘ α
pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f) · # H ⦃ g ⦄) c =
pr1 (# H (identity `(pr1 T) ⋆ pr1 f)) c
· pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T: hss
Z, Z': ptd_obj C
f: ptd_mor C Z Z'
g: ptd_mor C Z' (ptd_from_alg (pr1 T))
c: C
A:= horcomp_id_postwhisker C C C: ∏ (X X' : [C, C]) (α : [C, C] ⟦ X, X' ⟧)
(Z : [C, C]), nat_trans_id Z ⋆ α = Z ∘ α
pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f) · # H ⦃ g ⦄) c =
pr1 (# H (`(pr1 T) ∘ pr1 f)) c · pr1 (# H ⦃ g ⦄) c

    apply idpath.
Qed.

(** As a consequence of naturality, we can compute [fbracket f] from [fbracket identity] *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧),
⦃ f ⦄ =
(`T ∘ # U f
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C],
 U (ptd_from_alg T) ∙ `T : [C, C, C] ⟧)
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg T) ⦄


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧),
⦃ f ⦄ =
(`T ∘ # U f
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C],
 U (ptd_from_alg T) ∙ `T : [C, C, C] ⟧)
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg T) ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
⦃ f ⦄ =
(`T ∘ # U f
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C],
 U (ptd_from_alg T) ∙ `T : [C, C, C] ⟧)
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg T) ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
f = f · identity (ptd_from_alg T)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
A: f = f · identity (ptd_from_alg T)
⦃ f ⦄ =
(`T ∘ # U f
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C],
 U (ptd_from_alg T) ∙ `T : [C, C, C] ⟧)
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg T) ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
f = f · identity (ptd_from_alg T)
 rewrite id_right; apply idpath. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
A: f = f · identity (ptd_from_alg T)
⦃ f ⦄ =
(`T ∘ # U f
 :
 [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T : [C, C, C],
 U (ptd_from_alg T) ∙ `T : [C, C, C] ⟧)
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg T) ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
A: f = f · identity (ptd_from_alg T)
⦃ f · identity (ptd_from_alg T) ⦄ =
`T ∘ # U (f · identity (ptd_from_alg T))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg T) ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
A: f = f · identity (ptd_from_alg T)
`T ∘ # U f · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg T) ⦄ =
`T ∘ # U (f · identity (ptd_from_alg T))
· ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg T) ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
A: f = f · identity (ptd_from_alg T)
`T ∘ # U f · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg T) ⦄ =
`T ∘ # U f · ⦃ identity (ptd_from_alg T) ⦄

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Section from_identity_to_hss.
(** the operations of an hss can be obtained through this formula from
    just a heterogeneous substitution *)

  Context (T : algebra_ob Id_H).
  Context (prejoin : bracket_at H (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg _ _ _ _ _ θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T (identity _)).

  Let T0 : heterogeneous_substitution H :=
    T ,, (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg _ _ _ _ _ θ (ptd_from_alg T) ,, prejoin).


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T0 ⟧
bracket_property H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) T0 f
  ((`T0 ∘ # U f
    :
    [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T0 : [C, C, C],
    U (ptd_from_alg T0) ∙ `T0 : [C, C, C] ⟧)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T0 ⟧
bracket_property H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) T0 f
  ((`T0 ∘ # U f
    :
    [C, C] ⟦ U Z ∙ `T0 : [C, C, C],
    U (ptd_from_alg T0) ∙ `T0 : [C, C, C] ⟧)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T0 ⟧
bracket_property_parts H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
     (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z) T0 f
  (`T0 ∘ # U f · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T0 ⟧
# U f =
eta_from_alg H T0 •• U Z
· (`T0 ∘ # U f · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T0 ⟧
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T0
· # H (`T0 ∘ # U f · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
· tau_from_alg H T0 =
tau_from_alg H T0 •• U Z
· (`T0 ∘ # U f · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T0 ⟧
# U f =
eta_from_alg H T0 •• U Z
· (`T0 ∘ # U f · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T0 ⟧
∏ x : C,
# U f x =
(eta_from_alg H T0 •• U Z
 · (`T0 ∘ # U f · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)) x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T0 ⟧
c: C
# U f c =
(eta_from_alg H T0 •• U Z
 · (`T0 ∘ # U f · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
# U (f,, pt) c =
(eta_from_alg H T0 •• U Z
 · (`T0 ∘ # U (f,, pt) · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (pr1 `T) (pr1 f c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
f c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (pr1 `T) (pr1 f c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
f c = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
?b =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) 
  (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) T 
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (pr1 `T) (pr1 f c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c)

  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (alg_map

        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

      · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c))

  (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
        (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

         exact alg_map_nat.

prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
?b =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) 
  (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
   · alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H

f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
?b =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
   · alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c)

  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg

  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))

· # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c) = ?f
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))

nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· # (fix_a_category.Id_H H `T0) (pr1 f c) = ?f
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `T) (Z c) (pr1 T c)
    (pr1 f c) = ?f
 apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
f c =
# (functor_identity C) (pr1 f c)
· BinCoproductIn1
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 T c))
       (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
f c =
pr1 f c
· BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 T c) (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
f c · identity (pr1 T c) =
pr1 f c
· BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 T c) (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
f c · identity (pr1 T c) =
pr1 f c
· (BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 T c) (H `T (pr1 T c)))
   · (alg_map Id_H T (pr1 T c)
      · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c))

CP: BinCoproducts C

  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)

  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))

  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H

f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
identity (pr1 T c) =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 T c) (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· (alg_map Id_H T (pr1 T c)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c)

  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))

  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H

f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
identity (pr1 T c) =

· alg_map Id_H T (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
prejoin_ok: identity `T0 =
eta_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0
identity (pr1 T c) =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 T c) (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
prejoin_ok: pr1 (identity `T0) =
pr1
  (eta_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
identity (pr1 T c) =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 T c) (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

    
C: category

prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
prejoin_ok: pr1 (identity `T0) ~
pr1
  (eta_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
identity (pr1 T c) =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (pr1 T c) (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T (pr1 T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

    apply prejoin_ok.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T0 ⟧
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ Z `T0
· # H (`T0 ∘ # U f · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
· tau_from_alg H T0 =
tau_from_alg H T0 •• U Z
· (`T0 ∘ # U f · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T0 ⟧
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ Z `T0
· (# H (`T0 ∘ # U f) · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0))
· tau_from_alg H T0 =
tau_from_alg H T0 •• U Z
· (`T0 ∘ # U f · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T0 ⟧
∏ x : C,
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
   (θ_target H) θ Z `T0
 · (# H (`T0 ∘ # U f) · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0))
 · tau_from_alg H T0) x =
(tau_from_alg H T0 •• U Z
 · (`T0 ∘ # U f · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)) x

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T0 ⟧
c: C
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
   (θ_target H) θ Z `T0
 · (# H (`T0 ∘ # U f) · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0))
 · tau_from_alg H T0) c =
(tau_from_alg H T0 •• U Z
 · (`T0 ∘ # U f · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
(nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
   (θ_target H) θ Z `T0
 · (# H (`T0 ∘ # U (f,, pt))
    · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0))
 · tau_from_alg H T0) c =
(tau_from_alg H T0 •• U Z
 · (`T0 ∘ # U (f,, pt) · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)) c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c
· (# H (`T ∘ f) c · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (pr1 `T) (pr1 f c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c
· (# H (`T ∘ f) c · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (pr1 `T) (pr1 f c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c
· (# H (`T ∘ f) c · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
?b =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) 
  (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C] 
          (functor_identity C)) H) T 
    (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (pr1 `T) (pr1 f c) · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c)

H: Presignature C C C

prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))

  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H

f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C

· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =

  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
   · (# (pr1 `T) (pr1 f c)
      · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c))

· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =

· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)

  (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
        (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =

     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
        (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))

  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C

· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
?f =
alg_map
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
        (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· # (pr1 `T) (pr1 f c)

         exact alg_map_nat.

· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)

  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c
· (# H (`T ∘ f) c · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP

   · alg_map

· (# (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
   · alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)

  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f

· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
?b =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· (# (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
   · alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c)
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
?b =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Presignature C C C

Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
?f =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)

         
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c) = ?f
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· # (fix_a_category.Id_H H `T0) (pr1 f c) = ?f
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 (pr1 Z) c)
· BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `T) (Z c) (pr1 T c)
    (pr1 f c) = ?f
 apply BinCoproductIn2Commutes. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c
· (# H (`T ∘ f) c · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
# (H `T) (pr1 f c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 T c))
       (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
· tau_from_alg H T0 =
tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c
· (# H (`T ∘ f) c · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
# (H `T) (pr1 f c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 T c))
       (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H

f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0

c: C

· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) =
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c
· (# H (`T ∘ f) c · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
# (H `T) (pr1 f c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 T c))
       (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))

  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H

· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c
· (# H (`T ∘ f) c · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c)

   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
# (H `T) (pr1 f c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 T c))
       (H `T (pr1 T c)))

· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =

  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c

· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP

       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC

· BinCoproductIn2

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
prejoin_ok_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 `T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c
· (# H (`T ∘ f) c · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) =
# (H `T) (pr1 f c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 T c))
       (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
