CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
prejoin_ok_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 `T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c
· (# H (`T ∘ f) c · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
prejoin_ok_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 `T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
?b =
# (H `T) (pr1 f c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 T c))
       (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
prejoin_ok_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 `T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c
· (# H (`T ∘ f) c · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) = ?b

prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)

  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))

  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ

· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)

  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)

  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP

· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c · # H (`T ∘ f) c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T c = ?b

  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)

  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))

  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H

  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~

   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)

· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c · # H (`T ∘ f) c =
?f'

   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
prejoin_ok_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 `T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
theta_nat_2: # (pr1 (H `T0)) (pr1 (f,, pt) c)
· pr1 (θ (`T0 ⊗ ptd_from_alg T0)) c =
pr1 (θ (`T0 ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1
    (# H (identity `T0 ⋆ pr1 (f,, pt)))
    c
?f' =
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c · # H (`T ∘ f) c

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
prejoin_ok_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 `T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
theta_nat_2: # (pr1 (H `T0)) (pr1 (f,, pt) c)
· pr1 (θ (`T0 ⊗ ptd_from_alg T0)) c =
pr1 (θ (`T0 ⊗ Z)) c
· pr1 (# H (`T0 ∘ pr1 (f,, pt))) c
?f' =
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data [C, C] Ptd [C, C]
  (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ Z `T c · # H (`T ∘ f) c

      apply theta_nat_2.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
prejoin_ok_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 `T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
# (pr1 (H `T0)) (pr1 (f,, pt) c)
· pr1 (θ (`T0 ⊗ ptd_from_alg T0)) c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T c =
# (H `T) (pr1 f c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 T c))
       (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C

Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
prejoin_ok_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 `T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
# (pr1 (H `T0)) (pr1 (f,, pt) c)
· pr1 (θ (`T0 ⊗ ptd_from_alg T0)) c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T c = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
prejoin_ok_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 `T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
?b =
# (H `T) (pr1 f c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 T c))
       (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
prejoin_ok_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 `T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
# (pr1 (H `T0)) (pr1 (f,, pt) c)
· pr1 (θ (`T0 ⊗ ptd_from_alg T0)) c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T c = ?b

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H

c: C

· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
prejoin_ok_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =

  (functor_identity C) (H `T)

· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC

          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
# (pr1 (H `T0)) (pr1 (f,, pt) c)
· (pr1 (θ (`T0 ⊗ ptd_from_alg T0)) c
   · (# H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
      · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
           (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
         · alg_map
             (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
                CPEndC
                (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                   (functor_identity C)) H) T c))) =
?b

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))

  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H

· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)

  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)

  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =

  (functor_identity C) (H `T)

· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors

          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
pr1 (θ (`T0 ⊗ ptd_from_alg T0)) c
· (# H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
   · (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
        (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
      · alg_map
          (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C]
             CPEndC
             (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
                (functor_identity C)) H) T c)) = ?t2

      
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
prejoin_ok_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 `T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
pr1 (θ (`T0 ⊗ ptd_from_alg T0)) c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T c) = ?t2

      exact prejoin_ok_inst.
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
prejoin_ok: pr1
  (θ_from_hetsubst H T0 `T0
   · # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
   · tau_from_alg H T0) ~
pr1
  (tau_from_alg H T0 •• `T0
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0)
prejoin_ok_inst: nat_trans_fix_snd_arg_data 
  [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
  (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T) `T
  c
· # H (prejoin_from_hetsubst T0) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C) 
     (H `T) c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors
          [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor
             [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H)
       T c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T)
  (pr1 `T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors 
       [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor 
          [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T
    (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c
# (pr1 (H `T0)) (pr1 (f,, pt) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 `T c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 `T c)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c) =
# (H `T) (pr1 f c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 T c))
       (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
# (pr1 (H `T0)) (pr1 (f,, pt) c)
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 `T c)
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 `T c)
   · prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c) =
# (H `T) (pr1 f c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 T c))
       (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: algebra_ob Id_H
prejoin: bracket_at H
  (nat_trans_fix_snd_arg 
     [C, C] Ptd [C, C] (θ_source H)
     (θ_target H) θ (ptd_from_alg T)) T
  (identity (ptd_from_alg T))
T0:= T,,
nat_trans_fix_snd_arg [C, C] Ptd 
  [C, C] (θ_source H) (θ_target H) θ
  (ptd_from_alg T),, prejoin: heterogeneous_substitution H
Z: Ptd
f: Z ⟹ ptd_from_alg T0
pt: is_ptd_mor C f
c: C
alg_map_nat: # (Id_H `T0) (pr1 f c)
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c) =
alg_map Id_H T0 (Z c)
· # (`T0) (pr1 f c)
# (pr1 (H `T0)) (pr1 (f,, pt) c)
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H `T) (pr1 `T c)
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T (pr1 `T c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c =
# (H `T) (pr1 f c)
· BinCoproductIn2
    (CP (functor_identity C (pr1 T c))
       (H `T (pr1 T c)))
· alg_map Id_H T0 (ptd_from_alg T0 c)
· prejoin_from_hetsubst T0 c

    apply idpath.
Qed.

End from_identity_to_hss.

(** ** Morphisms of heterogeneous substitution systems *)


(** A morphism [f] of pointed functors is an algebra morphism when... *)
(*
Definition isAlgMor {T T' : Alg} (f : T --> T') : UU :=
  #H (# U f) · τ T' = compose (C:=EndC) (τ T) (#U f).

Lemma isaprop_isAlgMor (T T' : Alg) (f : T --> T') : isaprop (isAlgMor f).
Proof.
  apply isaset_nat_trans.
  apply hs.
Qed.
*)

(** a little preparation for much later *)

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
# H β · tau_from_alg H T' = tau_from_alg H T · β


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
# H β · tau_from_alg H T' = tau_from_alg H T · β

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
β_is_alg_mor: (λ f : [C, C] ⟦ pr1 T, pr1 T' ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 T) (pr2 T') f)
  (pr1 β)
# H β · tau_from_alg H T' = tau_from_alg H T · β

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
β_is_alg_mor: pr2 T · pr1 β =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C, C] 
     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H
  (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β) · 
pr2 T'
# H β · tau_from_alg H T' = tau_from_alg H T · β

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
β_is_alg_mor_inst: (λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC
           (functor_identity C)
           (H (pr1 T)), 
       pr1 T' ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
      (H (pr1 T))) · m)
  (pr2 T · pr1 β) =
(λ m : [C, C]
       ⟦ CPEndC
           (functor_identity C)
           (H (pr1 T)), 
       pr1 T' ⟧,
 BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
      (H (pr1 T))) · m)
  (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
     [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C]
        [C, C, C]
        (functor_identity C)) H
     (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β)
   · pr2 T')
# H β · tau_from_alg H T' = tau_from_alg H T · β

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
β_is_alg_mor_inst: BinCoproductIn2
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
     (H (pr1 T)))
· (pr2 T · pr1 β) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
     (H (pr1 T)))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
     [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C]
        [C, C, C]
        (functor_identity C)) H
     (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β)
   · pr2 T')
# H β · tau_from_alg H T' = tau_from_alg H T · β

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
β_is_alg_mor_inst: BinCoproductIn2
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
     (H (pr1 T)))
· (pr2 T · pr1 β) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
     (H (pr1 T)))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
     [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C]
        [C, C, C]
        (functor_identity C)) H
     (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β)
   · pr2 T')
∏ x : C,
(# H β · tau_from_alg H T') x =
(tau_from_alg H T · β) x

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
β_is_alg_mor_inst: BinCoproductIn2
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
     (H (pr1 T)))
· (pr2 T · pr1 β) =
BinCoproductIn2
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
     (H (pr1 T)))
· (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
     [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
     (constant_functor [C, C, C]
        [C, C, C]
        (functor_identity C)) H
     (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β)
   · pr2 T')
c: C
(# H β · tau_from_alg H T') c =
(tau_from_alg H T · β) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
β_is_alg_mor_inst': (BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
      (H (pr1 T)))
 · (pr2 T · pr1 β)) c =
(BinCoproductIn2
   (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
      (H (pr1 T)))
 · (BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor
      [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
      (constant_functor 
         [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
         (functor_identity C)) H
      (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β)
    · pr2 T')) c
(# H β · tau_from_alg H T') c =
(tau_from_alg H T · β) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
β_is_alg_mor_inst': coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c
· (pr2 T c · pr1 β c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C)
     (H (pr1 T))
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
        (H (pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T'))))
     (# H (pr1 β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T')))) c
   · pr2 T' c)
(# H β · tau_from_alg H T') c =
(tau_from_alg H T · β) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
β_is_alg_mor_inst': coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c · pr2 T c
· pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C)
     (H (pr1 T))
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
        (H (pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T'))))
     (# H (pr1 β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T')))) c
   · pr2 T' c)
(# H β · tau_from_alg H T') c =
(tau_from_alg H T · β) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
β_is_alg_mor_inst': coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c · pr2 T c
· pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C)
     (H (pr1 T))
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
        (H (pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T'))))
     (# H (pr1 β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T')))) c
   · pr2 T' c)
(# H β · tau_from_alg H T') c = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
β_is_alg_mor_inst': coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c · pr2 T c
· pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C)
     (H (pr1 T))
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
        (H (pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T'))))
     (# H (pr1 β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T')))) c
   · pr2 T' c)
?b = (tau_from_alg H T · β) c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
β_is_alg_mor_inst': coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c · pr2 T c
· pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C)
     (H (pr1 T))
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
        (H (pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T'))))
     (# H (pr1 β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T')))) c
   · pr2 T' c)
?b = (tau_from_alg H T · β) c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
β_is_alg_mor_inst': coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c · pr2 T c
· pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C)
     (H (pr1 T))
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
        (H (pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T'))))
     (# H (pr1 β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T')))) c
   · pr2 T' c)
(tau_from_alg H T · β) c = ?b

       exact β_is_alg_mor_inst'. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
β_is_alg_mor_inst': coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c · pr2 T c
· pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C
  CP (functor_identity C)
  (H (pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C
     CP (functor_identity C)
     (H (pr1 T))
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C)
        (H (pr1 T')))
     (identity
        (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T'))))
     (# H (pr1 β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC
             (functor_identity C)
             (H (pr1 T')))) c
   · pr2 T' c)
(# H β · tau_from_alg H T') c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
     (identity (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
     (# H (pr1 β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
     c · pr2 T' c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
(# H β · tau_from_alg H T') c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T)) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
     (identity (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
     (# H (pr1 β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
     c · pr2 T' c)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
(# H β · tau_from_alg H T') c =
(# H (pr1 β)
 · BinCoproductIn2
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))) c
· pr2 T' c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
# H β c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T') c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T' c) =
# H (pr1 β) c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')) c · pr2 T' c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
# H β c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H `T') c
   · alg_map
       (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
          (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
             (functor_identity C)) H) T' c) =
# H (pr1 β) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in2_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')) c · pr2 T' c)

  apply idpath.
Qed.


(** A morphism [β] of pointed functors is a bracket morphism when... *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
is_ptd_mor C (pr1 β)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
is_ptd_mor C (pr1 β)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
is_ptd_mor C (pr1 β)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
∏ c : C,
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg T) c · pr1 β c =
ptd_pt C (ptd_from_alg T') c
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
∏ c : C,
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T c · pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T') c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T' c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T c · pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T') c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T' c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) T c · pr1 β c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T') c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T' c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
X: (λ f : [C, C] ⟦ pr1 T, pr1 T' ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 T) (pr2 T') f) 
  (pr1 β)
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) T c · pr1 β c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T') c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T' c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
X: (λ f : [C, C] ⟦ pr1 T, pr1 T' ⟧,
 Core.mor_disp (pr2 T) (pr2 T') f) 
  (pr1 β)
X': (pr2 T · pr1 β) c = (# Id_H (pr1 β) · pr2 T') c
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) T c · pr1 β c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T') c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T' c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
X: pr2 T · pr1 β =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C, C] 
     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H 
  (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β) · 
pr2 T'
X': pr2 T c · pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
  (identity (functor_identity C)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  (# H (pr1 β)
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  c · pr2 T' c
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· (alg_map
     (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) T c · pr1 β c) =
coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T') c
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T' c

  (constant_functor [C, C, C] 
     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H 
  (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β) · 
pr2 T'
X': pr2 T c · pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
  (identity (functor_identity C)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))

  (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· (alg_map

        (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
           (functor_identity C)) H) T c · pr1 β c) =
?b

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C, C] 
     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H 
  (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β) · 
pr2 T'
X': pr2 T c · pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))

 apply X'.

  (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))

  (# H (pr1 β)
   · BinCoproductIn2

coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H `T) c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
     (identity (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
X: pr2 T · pr1 β =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C, C] 
     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H 
  (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β) · 
pr2 T'
X': pr2 T c · pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
  (identity (functor_identity C)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  (# H (pr1 β)
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  c · pr2 T' c
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T c))
· (coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
     (identity (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
     (# H (pr1 β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
     c · pr2 T' c) =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T' c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T' c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
X: pr2 T · pr1 β =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C, C] 
     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H 
  (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β) · 
pr2 T'
X': pr2 T c · pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
  (identity (functor_identity C)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  (# H (pr1 β)
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  c · pr2 T' c
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T c))
· coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP (functor_identity C)
    (H (pr1 T))
    (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
    (identity (functor_identity C)
     · BinCoproductIn1
         (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
    (# H (pr1 β)
     · BinCoproductIn2
         (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))) c
· pr2 T' c =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T' c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T' c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
X: pr2 T · pr1 β =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C, C] 
     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H 
  (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β) · 
pr2 T'
X': pr2 T c · pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
  (identity (functor_identity C)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  (# H (pr1 β)
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  c · pr2 T' c
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T c))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (functor_identity C c) (H (pr1 T) c))
    ((identity (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
       c)
    ((# H (pr1 β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
       c) · pr2 T' c =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T' c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T' c

  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C, C] 
     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H 
  (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β) · 
pr2 T'
X': pr2 T c · pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
  (identity (functor_identity C)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  (# H (pr1 β)
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  c · pr2 T' c
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T c))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (functor_identity C c) (H (pr1 T) c))
    ((identity (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
       c)
    ((# H (pr1 β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
       c) · pr2 T' c = ?b

BinCoproductIn1 (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T c))
· BinCoproductArrow
    (CP (functor_identity C c) (H (pr1 T) c))
    ((identity (functor_identity C)
      · BinCoproductIn1
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
       c)
    ((# H (pr1 β)
      · BinCoproductIn2
          (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
       c) = ?f'

    apply BinCoproductIn1Commutes. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
X: pr2 T · pr1 β =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C, C] 
     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H 
  (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β) · 
pr2 T'
X': pr2 T c · pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
  (identity (functor_identity C)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  (# H (pr1 β)
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  c · pr2 T' c
(identity (functor_identity C)
 · BinCoproductIn1
     (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))) c
· pr2 T' c =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP (functor_identity C c) (H `T' c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T' c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
X: pr2 T · pr1 β =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C, C] 
     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H 
  (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β) · 
pr2 T'
X': pr2 T c · pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
  (identity (functor_identity C)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  (# H (pr1 β)
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  c · pr2 T' c
identity c
· coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
    (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')) c · pr2 T' c =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP c (H `T' c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T' c

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: functor_precategory_data C C
⟶ functor_precategory_data C C
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
c: C
X: pr2 T · pr1 β =
BinCoproduct_of_functors_mor 
  [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
  (constant_functor [C, C, C] 
     [C, C, C] (functor_identity C)) H 
  (pr1 T) (pr1 T') (pr1 β) · 
pr2 T'
X': pr2 T c · pr1 β c =
coproduct_nat_trans_data C C CP
  (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T))
  (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')))
  (identity (functor_identity C)
   · BinCoproductIn1
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  (# H (pr1 β)
   · BinCoproductIn2
       (CPEndC (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T'))))
  c · pr2 T' c
identity c
· (coproduct_nat_trans_in1_data C C CP
     (functor_identity C) (H (pr1 T')) c · pr2 T' c) =
BinCoproductIn1 (CP c (H `T' c))
· alg_map
    (BinCoproduct_of_functors [C, C] [C, C] CPEndC
       (constant_functor [C, C, C] [C, C, C]
          (functor_identity C)) H) T' c

  apply id_left.
Qed.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
Ptd ⟦ ptd_from_alg T, ptd_from_alg T' ⟧


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
Ptd ⟦ ptd_from_alg T, ptd_from_alg T' ⟧

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': algebra_ob Id_H
β: algebra_mor Id_H T T'
is_ptd_mor C (pr1 β)

  apply is_ptd_mor_alg_mor.
Defined.

(** show functor laws for [ptd_from_alg] and [ptd_from_alg_mor] *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
functor_data (category_FunctorAlg Id_H) Ptd


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
functor_data (category_FunctorAlg Id_H) Ptd

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
∏ a b : category_FunctorAlg Id_H,
category_FunctorAlg Id_H ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ Ptd ⟦ ptd_from_alg a, ptd_from_alg b ⟧

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': category_FunctorAlg Id_H
β: category_FunctorAlg Id_H ⟦ T, T' ⟧
Ptd ⟦ ptd_from_alg T, ptd_from_alg T' ⟧

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': category_FunctorAlg Id_H
β: category_FunctorAlg Id_H ⟦ T, T' ⟧
algebra_mor Id_H T T'

  exact β.
Defined.


C: category

θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
is_functor ptd_from_alg_functor_data

C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
∏
a : Total.total_category_data
      (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H),
# ptd_from_alg_functor_data (identity a) =
identity (ptd_from_alg_functor_data a)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: Total.total_category_data
  (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H)
# ptd_from_alg_functor_data (identity T) =
identity (ptd_from_alg_functor_data T)

    (* match goal with | [ |- ?l = _ ] => let ty:= (type of l) in idtac ty end. *)
    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: Total.total_category_data
  (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H)
# ptd_from_alg_functor_data (identity T) =
identity (ptd_from_alg_functor_data T)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: Total.total_category_data
  (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H)
# ptd_from_alg_functor_data (identity T) =
identity (ptd_from_alg_functor_data T)

    (* match goal with | [ |- ?l = _ ] => let ty:= (type of l) in idtac ty end. *)
    apply idpath.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
functor_compax ptd_from_alg_functor_data
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
∏
(a b
 c : Total.total_category_data
       (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H))
(f : Total.total_category_data
       (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H) ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : Total.total_category_data
       (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H) ⟦ b, c ⟧),
# ptd_from_alg_functor_data (f · g) =
# ptd_from_alg_functor_data f
· # ptd_from_alg_functor_data g

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T', T'': Total.total_category_data
  (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H)
β: Total.total_category_data
  (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H) ⟦ T, T' ⟧
β': Total.total_category_data
  (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H) ⟦ T', T'' ⟧
# ptd_from_alg_functor_data (β · β') =
# ptd_from_alg_functor_data β
· # ptd_from_alg_functor_data β'

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T', T'': Total.total_category_data
  (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H)
β: Total.total_category_data
  (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H) ⟦ T, T' ⟧
β': Total.total_category_data
  (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H) ⟦ T', T'' ⟧
# ptd_from_alg_functor_data (β · β') =
# ptd_from_alg_functor_data β
· # ptd_from_alg_functor_data β'

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T', T'': Total.total_category_data
  (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H)
β: Total.total_category_data
  (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H) ⟦ T, T' ⟧
β': Total.total_category_data
  (algebra_disp_cat_data Id_H) ⟦ T', T'' ⟧
# ptd_from_alg_functor_data (β · β') =
# ptd_from_alg_functor_data β
· # ptd_from_alg_functor_data β'

    apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition ptd_from_alg_functor: functor (category_FunctorAlg Id_H) Ptd :=
  tpair _ _ is_functor_ptd_from_alg_functor_data.


Definition isbracketMor {T T' : hss} (β : algebra_mor _ T T') : UU :=
    ∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Z --> ptd_from_alg T),
      ⦃ f ⦄ · β = β •• U Z · ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor β ⦄.



C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β: algebra_mor (fix_a_category.Id_H H) T T'
isaprop (isbracketMor β)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β: algebra_mor (fix_a_category.Id_H H) T T'
isaprop (isbracketMor β)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β: algebra_mor (fix_a_category.Id_H H) T T'
t: Ptd
t0: Ptd ⟦ t, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
isofhlevel 1
  (⦃ t0 ⦄ · β =
   β •• U t · ⦃ t0 · # ptd_from_alg_functor β ⦄)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β: algebra_mor (fix_a_category.Id_H H) T T'
t: Ptd
t0: Ptd ⟦ t, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
has_homsets C

  apply homset_property.
Qed.

(** A morphism of hss is a pointed morphism that is compatible with both
    [τ] and [fbracket] *)

Definition ishssMor {T T' : hss} (β : algebra_mor _ T T') : UU
  :=   isbracketMor β.

Definition hssMor (T T' : hss) : UU
  := ∑ β : algebra_mor _ T T', ishssMor β.

Coercion ptd_mor_from_hssMor (T T' : hss) (β : hssMor T T') : algebra_mor _ T T' := pr1 β.

(*
Definition isAlgMor_hssMor {T T' : hss} (β : hssMor T T')
  : isAlgMor β := pr1 (pr2 β).
*)
Definition isbracketMor_hssMor {T T' : hss} (β : hssMor T T')
  : isbracketMor β := pr2 β.

(** **** Equality of morphisms of hss *)

Section hssMor_equality.

(** Show that equality of hssMor is equality of underlying nat. transformations *)

Context (T T' : hss) (β β' : hssMor T T').


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
β = β' ≃ pr1 β = pr1 β'


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
β = β' ≃ pr1 β = pr1 β'

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
isPredicate
  (λ β : algebra_mor (fix_a_category.Id_H H) T T',
   ishssMor β)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
γ: algebra_mor (fix_a_category.Id_H H) T T'
isaprop (ishssMor γ)

  apply isaprop_isbracketMor.
Defined.



C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
β = β' ≃ (β : [C, C] ⟦ `T, `T' ⟧) = β'


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
β = β' ≃ (β : [C, C] ⟦ `T, `T' ⟧) = β'

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
β = β' ≃ ?Y
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
?Y ≃ β = β'

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
β = β' ≃ ?Y
 apply hssMor_eq1.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
pr1 β = pr1 β' ≃ β = β'
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
isPredicate
  (λ f : [C, C] ⟦ pr1 T, pr1 T' ⟧,
   Core.mor_disp (pr2 T) (pr2 T') f)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
x: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 T, pr1 T' ⟧
isaprop (Core.mor_disp (pr2 T) (pr2 T') x)

    
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
x: [C, C] ⟦ pr1 T, pr1 T' ⟧
has_homsets C

    apply homset_property.
Defined.

End hssMor_equality.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
isaset (hssMor T T')


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
isaset (hssMor T T')

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
isaprop (β = β')

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
isofhlevel 1 (β = β')

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss
β, β': hssMor T T'
has_homsets C

  apply homset_property.
Qed.

(** ** The precategory of hss *)

(** *** Identity morphism of hss *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
ishssMor (identity (pr1 T))


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
ishssMor (identity (pr1 T))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
isbracketMor (identity (pr1 T))

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧),
⦃ f ⦄ · identity (pr1 T) =
identity (pr1 T) •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor (identity (pr1 T)) ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
⦃ f ⦄ · identity (pr1 T) =
identity (pr1 T) •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor (identity (pr1 T)) ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
⦃ f ⦄ =
identity (pr1 T) •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor (identity (pr1 T)) ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
⦃ f ⦄ =
identity (pr1 T) •• U Z
· ⦃ f · identity (ptd_from_alg_functor (pr1 T)) ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
⦃ f ⦄ = identity (pr1 T) •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
identity (pr1 T) •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄ = ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
H2:= ℓ (U Z): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
identity (pr1 T) •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄ = ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
H2:= ℓ (U Z): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
H2':= functor_id H2: ∏ a : [C, C],
# H2 (identity a) = identity (H2 a)
identity (pr1 T) •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄ = ⦃ f ⦄
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
H2:= ℓ (U Z): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
H2':= functor_id H2: ∏ a : C ⟶ C,
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) (identity a) =
identity (functor_compose (pr1 Z) a)
identity (pr1 T) •• U Z · ⦃ f ⦄ = ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
H2:= ℓ (U Z): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
H2':= functor_id H2: ∏ a : C ⟶ C,
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) (identity a) =
identity (functor_compose (pr1 Z) a)
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z)
  (identity (pr1 (pr1 T))) · ⦃ f ⦄ = ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
H2:= ℓ (U Z): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
H2':= functor_id H2: ∏ a : C ⟶ C,
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) (identity a) =
identity (functor_compose (pr1 Z) a)
identity (functor_compose (pr1 Z) (pr1 (pr1 T)))
· ⦃ f ⦄ = ⦃ f ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T: hss
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
H2:= ℓ (U Z): [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
H2':= functor_id H2: ∏ a : C ⟶ C,
pre_whisker_in_funcat C C C (pr1 Z) (identity a) =
identity (functor_compose (pr1 Z) a)
⦃ f ⦄ = ⦃ f ⦄

  apply idpath.
Qed.

Definition hssMor_id (T : hss) : hssMor _ _ := tpair _ _ (ishssMor_id T).

(** *** Composition of morphisms of hss *)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T', T'': hss
β: hssMor T T'
γ: hssMor T' T''
ishssMor (pr1 β · pr1 γ)


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T', T'': hss
β: hssMor T T'
γ: hssMor T' T''
ishssMor (pr1 β · pr1 γ)

CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T', T'': hss
β: hssMor T T'
γ: hssMor T' T''
isbracketMor (pr1 β · pr1 γ)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T', T'': hss
β: hssMor T T'
γ: hssMor T' T''
∏ (Z : Ptd) (f : Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧),
⦃ f ⦄ · (pr1 β · pr1 γ) =
(pr1 β · pr1 γ) •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor (pr1 β · pr1 γ) ⦄

CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Presignature C C C

γ: hssMor T' T''

f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧

(pr1 β · pr1 γ) •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor (pr1 β · pr1 γ) ⦄

H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

γ: hssMor T' T''
