f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
⦃ f ⦄ · pr1 (pr1 β) · pr1 (pr1 γ) =
(pr1 β · pr1 γ) •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor (pr1 β · pr1 γ) ⦄

  (* match goal with | [|- ?l = _ ] => assert (Hyp : l = fbracket T f· pr1 β· pr1 γ) end. *)
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

T, T', T'': hss
β: hssMor T T'
γ: hssMor T' T''
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
⦃ f ⦄ · pr1 (pr1 β) · pr1 (pr1 γ) = ?b
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

T, T', T'': hss
β: hssMor T T'
γ: hssMor T' T''
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
?b =
(pr1 β · pr1 γ) •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor (pr1 β · pr1 γ) ⦄

γ: hssMor T' T''

f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
⦃ f ⦄ · pr1 (pr1 β) · pr1 (pr1 γ) = ?b

Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
⦃ f ⦄ · pr1 (pr1 β) = ?f'

    apply isbracketMor_hssMor.

β •• U Z · ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor β ⦄
· pr1 (pr1 γ) =
(pr1 β · pr1 γ) •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor (pr1 β · pr1 γ) ⦄

· (⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor β ⦄ · pr1 (pr1 γ)) =

· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor (pr1 β · pr1 γ) ⦄

· (⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor β ⦄ · pr1 (pr1 γ)) =

CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

β: hssMor T T'
γ: hssMor T' T''
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor β ⦄ · pr1 (pr1 γ) = ?t2

    apply isbracketMor_hssMor. 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

T, T', T'': hss
β: hssMor T T'
γ: hssMor T' T''
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
β •• U Z
· (γ •• U Z
   · ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor β
       · # ptd_from_alg_functor γ ⦄) =
(pr1 β · pr1 γ) •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor (pr1 β · pr1 γ) ⦄

H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

T, T', T'': hss
β: hssMor T T'
γ: hssMor T' T''

f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
β •• U Z · γ •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor β
    · # ptd_from_alg_functor γ ⦄ =
(pr1 β · pr1 γ) •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor (pr1 β · pr1 γ) ⦄

β: hssMor T T'
γ: hssMor T' T''

f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
β •• U Z · γ •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor β
    · # ptd_from_alg_functor γ ⦄ =
(pr1 β · pr1 γ) •• U Z
· ⦃ f
    · (# ptd_from_alg_functor (pr1 β)
       · # ptd_from_alg_functor (pr1 γ)) ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T', T'': hss
β: hssMor T T'
γ: hssMor T' T''
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
β •• U Z · γ •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor β
    · # ptd_from_alg_functor γ ⦄ =
(pr1 β · pr1 γ) •• U Z
· ⦃ f · # ptd_from_alg_functor (pr1 β)
    · # ptd_from_alg_functor (pr1 γ) ⦄

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T', T'': hss
β: hssMor T T'
γ: hssMor T' T''
Z: Ptd
f: Ptd ⟦ Z, ptd_from_alg T ⟧
β •• U Z · γ •• U Z = (pr1 β · pr1 γ) •• U Z

  apply pathsinv0, (functor_comp (pre_composition_functor _ _ C (U Z)) ).
Qed.

Definition hssMor_comp {T T' T'' : hss} (β : hssMor T T') (γ : hssMor T' T'')
  : hssMor T T'' := tpair _ _ (ishssMor_comp β γ).


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
precategory_ob_mor


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
precategory_ob_mor

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
hss → hss → UU

  exact hssMor.
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
precategory_data

H: Presignature C C C

H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
precategory_id_comp hss_obmor

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C

H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
∏ c : hss_obmor, hss_obmor ⟦ c, c ⟧
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
∏ a b c : hss_obmor,
hss_obmor ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ hss_obmor ⟦ b, c ⟧ → hss_obmor ⟦ a, c ⟧

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
∏ c : hss_obmor, hss_obmor ⟦ c, c ⟧
 exact hssMor_id.
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
∏ a b c : hss_obmor,
hss_obmor ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ hss_obmor ⟦ b, c ⟧ → hss_obmor ⟦ a, c ⟧
 exact @hssMor_comp.
Defined.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H

is_precategory hss_precategory_data

is_precategory hss_precategory_data

H: Presignature C C C

is_precategory_one_assoc hss_precategory_data

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
a, b: hss_precategory_data
f: hss_precategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
identity a · f = f
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
a, b: hss_precategory_data
f: hss_precategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
f · identity b = f
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
a, b, c, d: hss_precategory_data
f: hss_precategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: hss_precategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: hss_precategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f · (g · h) = f · g · h

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
a, b: hss_precategory_data
f: hss_precategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
identity a · f = f
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
a, b: hss_precategory_data
f: hss_precategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
identity a · f = f

    apply (@id_left EndC).
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
a, b: hss_precategory_data
f: hss_precategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
f · identity b = f
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
a, b: hss_precategory_data
f: hss_precategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
f · identity b = f

    apply (@id_right EndC).
  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
a, b, c, d: hss_precategory_data
f: hss_precategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: hss_precategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: hss_precategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f · (g · h) = f · g · h
 
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
a, b, c, d: hss_precategory_data
f: hss_precategory_data ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: hss_precategory_data ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: hss_precategory_data ⟦ c, d ⟧
f · (g · h) = f · g · h

    apply (@assoc EndC).
Qed.

Definition hss_precategory : precategory := tpair _ _ is_precategory_hss.


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
has_homsets hss_precategory


C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
has_homsets hss_precategory

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
∏ a b : hss_precategory,
isaset (hss_precategory ⟦ a, b ⟧)

  
C: category
CP: BinCoproducts C
CPEndC:= BinCoproducts_functor_precat C C CP: BinCoproducts [C, C]
H: Presignature C C C
θ:= theta H: PrestrengthForSignature H
Id_H:= fix_a_category.Id_H H: [C, C] ⟶ [C, C]
T, T': hss_precategory
isaset (hss_precategory ⟦ T, T' ⟧)

  apply isaset_hssMor.
Qed.

Definition hss_category : category := hss_precategory ,, has_homsets_precategory_hss.

End def_hss.

End fix_a_category.

Notation η := eta_from_alg.
